name: @eqlcc/e2e
description: Golden end-to-end test for EQL Command Center (issue #21, E1.1): drives the full M1 chain — synthetic log file → IngestPipeline.replay → @eqlcc/database → rebuildProjections → the analytics read API — over rich synthetic multi-actor fixtures, asserting the end-to-end invariants (full-pipeline determinism, kill-and-resume determinism, idempotent re-replay, incremental == rebuild, pet-fold + named-enemy attribution, read-API sanity). Test-only; publishes nothing.
